results.command:
bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail
port=17431
bin=/tmp/tealotter-fr-clmemlazy-baseline-target/release-perf/frankenredis
bench=/tmp/tealotter-fr-clmemlazy-baseline-target/release-perf/fr-bench
log=/data/projects/frankenredis/artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-clmemlazy/pass103-current/baseline-server.log
"$bin" --port "$port" --bind 127.0.0.1 --mode strict >>"$log" 2>&1 &
pid=$!
trap "kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT
ready=0
for _ in $(seq 1 100); do
  if /data/projects/frankenredis/legacy_redis_code/redis/src/redis-cli -p "$port" PING >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    ready=1
    break
  fi
  sleep 0.05
done
test "$ready" = 1
"$bench" --port "$port" --workload set --clients 50 --requests 300000 --pipeline 16 --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --json-out /data/projects/frankenredis/artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-clmemlazy/pass103-current/baseline-set-p16-300k-last.json
/data/projects/frankenredis/legacy_redis_code/redis/src/redis-cli -p "$port" SHUTDOWN NOSAVE >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true'
